since_last: 75% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.23%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 75% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.84% · BTC +0.25% · Gold +1.46% · Nasdaq100 +1.53%. 75% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.23%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.23%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.81%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +9.97%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +9.97%, SOUN +7.63%, AMD +7.32%, INOD +7.23%, ANET +7.13%. Laggards: AVAV -5.54%, SPCX -3.33%, OKLO -2.77%, UPST -2.76%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.33% at $156.61
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.33% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
